name: Elektro Redes S.A.
summary: Elektro Redes S.A. engages in the distribution of electricity to homes and businesses in Brazil. The company distributes electricity to 223 cities of S√É¬£o Paulo and 5 cities of Mato Grosso do Sul. It serves approximately 6 million people.
